message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: My feature (hash_sha256 type) only needs to add a new type definition to outlines/types/__init__.py. Let me know if you also need this file so we can split further.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Adding ssn type after isbn definition, small addition only

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Both features add one line to this small file. I will append 'ssn' at the very end of the file (after isbn). Please append 'hash_sha256' after that, or anywhere that doesn't overlap my new ssn block, so our diffs don't clobber each other. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: We both only need to append a new Regex type to this same file. To avoid clobbering: I'll append my hash_sha256 definition at the very end of the file using an Edit anchored on the isbn block (or your ssn block if it lands first). Please do the same (anchor your edit, don't rewrite the whole file). I'll edit first now; ping me with DONE so I know your insertion point, or feel free to go first if you're ready.

type: DONE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Added ssn = Regex(r'\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}') right after the isbn block, anchored edit only touching that region. Safe for you to append hash_sha256 anywhere else in the file.

type: DONE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Appended hash_sha256 = Regex(r'[a-fA-F0-9]{64}') right after the isbn block (end of file, before your ssn addition). Tested matches() for valid/invalid cases and __get_pydantic_json_schema__ - all good. Go ahead and append ssn wherever convenient (before or after mine), our edits shouldn't collide.
